title: The Rats
actors: Maria Schell, Curd Jürgens, Heidemarie Hatheyer
plot: In the early Fifties Pauline Karka (Maria Schell) comes to Berlin. She is pregnant and totally penniless. She meets the laundry owner Anna John (Heidemarie Hatheyer) who always yearned to become a mother but hasn't been able to. P...
